questionHtml:
Let L2 be the regression line of y on x. The lines L1 and L2 pass through the same point with coordinates (p , q).

Find the value of p and the value of q.
markschemeHtml:
recognising both lines pass through the mean point       (M1)

p = 28.7, q = 30.3       A2

[3 marks]

meta.title: Let L2 be the regression line of y on x. The lines L1 and L2 pass through the same point with coordinates (p , q). Find the value of p and the value of q.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.4—Pearsons, scatter diagrams, eqn of y on x
